mainEntity.name: Who Is Responsible for My Hospital Bills?
mainEntity.text: Who Is Responsible for My Hospital Bills?

acceptedAnswer.text: Confused about who pays for your ER visit? If it happened while working, your employer's workers' comp insurance should cover 100% of those bills—no deductibles for you. This includes rehab, meds, and follow-ups. If you're getting bills in the mail, something is wrong with how the claim was filed. Give us a ring at 801-746-0290, and we'll help get those collectors off your back.
